title: 10.  Another way to deal with lung involvement problems =
text:
 Weakness of the lungs
 Dyspnea and shortness of breath
 Cough
Needle location (follow a – f )
a) 1.5 needles above the wrist line
b) between the ulnar bone and the carpal flexor tendon of the Ulnaris
c) subcutaneous with an angle of about 20 degrees upwards
d) bilateral
e) preferably with a 25-needle
f) the handle of the needles is fixed with tape and lasts up to 24 hours.
31 | P a g e
